name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state



Init == \A i \in 1..N: state[i] = idle

Next == \E i \in 1..N:
    /\ state[i] = idle
    /\ state[i] := trying
    \/ state[i] = trying
    /\ state[i] := critical
    \/ state[i] = critical
    /\ state[i] := idle

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

TypeOK == \A i \in 1..N: state[i] \in {idle, trying, critical}

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants, Coordinator
VARIABLES coordinator, participants, state, votes


vars == <<participants, coordinator>>

Init == /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> "idle"]
        /\ coordinator = [state |-> "idle", votes |-> <<>>]

Prepare == /\ coordinator.state = "idle"
           /\ coordinator.votes = <<>>
           /\ coordinator.state' = "waiting"
           /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p] = "idle"

VoteYes == /\ coordinator.state = "waiting"
           /\ \E p \in Participants: participants[p] = "idle"
           /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "votedYes"]
           /\ coordinator.votes' = Append(coordinator.votes, "yes")

VoteNo == /\ coordinator.state = "waiting"
          /\ \E p \in Participants: participants[p] = "idle"
          /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "votedNo"]
          /\ coordinator.votes' = Append(coordinator.votes, "no")

Commit == /\ coordinator.state = "waiting"
          /\ coordinator.votes = Replicate(N, "yes")
          /\ coordinator.state' = "committed"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p] = "committed"

Abort == /\ coordinator.state = "waiting"
         /\ \E v \in coordinator.votes: v = "no"
         /\ coordinator.state' = "aborted"
         /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p] = "aborted"

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ coordinator \in [state : {"idle", "waiting", "committed", "aborted"}, votes : Seq({"yes")]
          /\ participants \in [p \in Participants |-> {"idle", "votedYes", "votedNo", "committed", "aborted"}]
          /\ Len(coordinator.votes) <= N
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p] \in {"idle", "votedYes", "votedNo", "committed", "aborted"}

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES forkOwner, hasn, philosopherState


\* Philosopher states
States == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

\* Each philosopher is identified by an integer 0..N-1
Philosophers == 0 .. N-1

\* Each fork is identified by an integer 0..N-1
Forks == 0 .. N-1

\* Helper to get the left and right fork indices for a philosopher
LeftFork == [p \in Philosophers |-> p]
RightFork == [p \in Philosophers |-> (p + 1) % N]

\* State of each philosopher
\*  - "thinking": philosopher is thinking
\*  - "hungry": philosopher wants to eat but hasn't acquired forks yet
\*  - "eating": philosopher has acquired both forks and is eating
philosopherState == [p \in Philosophers |-> "thinking"]

\* Ownership of each fork
\*  - If fork f is owned by philosopher p, forkOwner[f] = p
\*  - If fork f is free, forkOwner[f] = -1
forkOwner == [f \in Forks |-> -1]

\* Helper to check if a philosopher can eat
CanEat(p) == philosopherState[p] = "hungry" /\ forkOwner[LeftFork[p]] = -1 /\ forkOwner[RightFork[p]] = -1

\* Action: philosopher p becomes hungry
BecomeHungry(p) == philosopherState' = [philosopherState EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]

\* Action: philosopher p starts eating (acquires both forks)
StartEating(p) == philosopherState' = [philosopherState EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"] /\ forkOwner' = [forkOwner EXCEPT ![LeftFork[p]] = p, ![RightFork[p]] = p]

\* Action: philosopher p stops eating (releases both forks)
StopEating(p) == philosopherState' = [philosopherState EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"] /\ forkOwner' = [forkOwner EXCEPT ![LeftFork[p]] = -1, ![RightFork[p]] = -1]

\* Next-state relation
Next == \/ \E p \in Philosophers: philosopherState[p] = "thinking" /\ BecomeHungry(p)
      \/ \E p \in Philosophers: CanEat(p) /\ StartEating(p)
      \/ \E p \in Philosophers: philosopherState[p] = "eating" /\ StopEating(p)

\* Initial state
Init == philosopherState = [p \in Philosophers |-> "thinking"] /\ forkOwner = [f \in Forks |-> -1]

\* Specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosopherState, forkOwner>>

\* Type correctness invariant
TypeOK == /\ philosopherState \in [Philosophers -> States]
          /\ forkOwner \in [Forks -> {p \in Philosophers} \cup {-1}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = Max(num) + 1]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => flag'[j] = FALSE
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => num'[j] = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ q[tail] = 0
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ q[head] = 1
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ tail' = tail

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
          /\ q \in [1..K -> {0,1}]

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority, NULL
VARIABLES currentTerm, state, votedFor

    /\ currentTerm = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ state[i] = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Candidate"]
        /\ currentTerm' = [currentTerm EXCEPT ![i] = currentTerm[i] + 1]
        /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = i]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Leader"]
        /\ \E j \in 1..N: j # i => currentTerm[j] <= currentTerm[i]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ state[i] = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = state

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = <<>> 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  /\ \E r \in 1..Cardinality(readers) :
        /\ readers[r] = TRUE
        /\ readers' = Replace(readers, r, FALSE)
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ \E r \in 1..Cardinality(readers) :
        /\ readers[r] = FALSE
        /\ readers' = Replace(readers, r, TRUE)
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ \E r \in 1..Cardinality(readers) : readers[r] = FALSE
     /\ writer_active' = TRUE
     /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N
CONSTANT Channels

VARIABLES state, channel, recorded, markerSent

(* Local state of each process: 0 = not recorded, 1 = recorded *)
Init == 
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ channel = [i \in 1..N, j \in 1..N |-> {}]
    /\ recorded = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
    /\ markerSent = [i \in 1..N, j \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Sending a regular message from process i to process j *)
SendMsg(i, j, msg) == 
    /\ state[i] = 1
    /\ channeli..j = channeli..j \cup {msg}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, markerSent>>

(* Receiving a regular message at process j from process i *)
RecvMsg(i, j, msg) == 
    /\ state[j] = 1
    /\ msg \in channeli..j
    /\ channeli..j = channeli..j \ {msg}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, markerSent>>

(* Sending a marker from process i to process j *)
SendMarker(i, j) == 
    /\ state[i] = 1
    /\ markerSenti..j = FALSE
    /\ channeli..j = channeli..j \cup {"marker"}
    /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT !i..j = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded>>

(* Receiving a marker at process j from process i *)
RecvMarker(i, j) == 
    /\ state[j] = 0
    /\ "marker" \in channeli..j
    /\ channeli..j = channeli..j \ {"marker"}
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![j] = 1]
    /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![j] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, markerSent>>

(* Receiving a marker at process j from process i after recording *)
RecvMarkerAfter(i, j) == 
    /\ state[j] = 1
    /\ "marker" \in channeli..j
    /\ channeli..j = channeli..j \ {"marker"}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, markerSent>>

(* Transition relation *)
Next == 
    \E i, j \in 1..N :
        \/ SendMsg(i, j, "msg")
        \/ RecvMsg(i, j, "msg")
        \/ SendMarker(i, j)
        \/ RecvMarker(i, j)
        \/ RecvMarkerAfter(i, j)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, recorded, markerSent>>

(* Type correctness *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {0,1}]
    /\ channel \in [1..N, 1..N -> SUBSET {"msg", "marker"}]
    /\ recorded \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ markerSent \in [1..N, 1..N -> BOOLEAN]

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token \in 1..N  \* Current holder of the token, token

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL
VARIABLES store


vars == <<store>>

Init == 
  /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == 
  \/ /\ op = "Put"
     /\ k \in Keys
     /\ v \in Values
     /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
  \/ /\ op = "Get"
     /\ k \in Keys
     /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ Keys \subseteq Nat
  /\ Values \subseteq Nat
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, maxBallot, maxValue

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [maxBallot: Int, maxValue: V]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [maxBallot: Int, maxValue: V]]
  /\ chosen \in V

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot |-> 0, maxValue |-> 0]]
  /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot |-> 0, maxValue |-> 0]]
  /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(a, p) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot + 1
  /\ acceptors[a].maxBallot' = acceptors[a].maxBallot
  /\ acceptors[a].maxValue' = acceptors[a].maxValue
  /\ proposers[p].maxValue' = acceptors[a].maxValue

Promise(a, p) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
  /\ proposers[p].maxValue' = proposers[p].maxValue
  /\ acceptors[a].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
  /\ acceptors[a].maxValue' = acceptors[a].maxValue

Accept(a, p) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
  /\ proposers[p].maxValue' = proposers[p].maxValue
  /\ acceptors[a].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
  /\ acceptors[a].maxValue' = proposers[p].maxValue

Accepted(a, p) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
  /\ proposers[p].maxValue' = proposers[p].maxValue
  /\ acceptors[a].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
  /\ acceptors[a].maxValue' = proposers[p].maxValue
  /\ chosen' = proposers[p].maxValue

Next == 
  /\ \E a \in 1..N : \E p \in 1..M : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
        /\ proposers[p].maxValue' = proposers[p].maxValue
        /\ acceptors[a].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
        /\ acceptors[a].maxValue' = proposers[p].maxValue
        /\ chosen' = chosen
        /\ \/ /\ proposers[p].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot + 1
            /\ acceptors[a].maxBallot' = acceptors[a].maxBallot
            /\ acceptors[a].maxValue' = acceptors[a].maxValue
            /\ proposers[p].maxValue' = acceptors[a].maxValue
          \/ /\ proposers[p].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
              /\ proposers[p].maxValue' = proposers[p].maxValue
              /\ acceptors[a].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
              /\ acceptors[a].maxValue' = acceptors[a].maxValue
          \/ /\ proposers[p].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
              /\ proposers[p].maxValue' = proposers[p].maxValue
              /\ acceptors[a].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
              /\ acceptors[a].maxValue' = proposers[p].maxValue
              /\ chosen' = proposers[p].maxValue
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


CONSTANTS FileSize, ChunkSize, MaxRetries, Timeout, FileSize
VARIABLES ackedChunks, currentChunk, retransmitCount, sentChunks, state, time, timer


(* Helper definitions *)
NumChunks == Ceil(FileSize \div ChunkSize)
ChunkIndices == 1 .. NumChunks
Chunk(i) == SubSeq(Seq(1 .. FileSize), (i - 1) * ChunkSize + 1, Min(i * ChunkSize, FileSize))

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ ackedChunks = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in ChunkIndices |-> 0]
    /\ timer = 0
    /\ currentChunk = 1
    /\ state = "Idle"
    /\ time = 0

(* Action: Transmit a chunk *)
TransmitChunk ==
    /\ state = "Idle"
    /\ currentChunk <= NumChunks
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {currentChunk}
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![currentChunk] = 0]
    /\ timer' = Timeout
    /\ state' = "WaitingAck"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ackedChunks, currentChunk, time>>

(* Action: Receive an acknowledgment *)
ReceiveAck ==
    /\ state = "WaitingAck"
    /\ currentChunk \in ChunkIndices
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {currentChunk}
    /\ timer' = 0
    /\ IF currentChunk = NumChunks THEN
           /\ state' = "Done"
           /\ currentChunk' = currentChunk

           /\ state' = "Idle"
           /\ currentChunk' = currentChunk + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, retransmitCount, time>>

(* Action: Timeout and retransmit *)
TimeoutRetransmit ==
    /\ state = "WaitingAck"
    /\ timer = 0
    /\ retransmitCount[currentChunk] < MaxRetries
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![currentChunk] = retransmitCount[currentChunk] + 1]
    /\ timer' = Timeout
    /\ state' = "WaitingAck"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, ackedChunks, currentChunk, time>>

(* Action: Timeout and fail *)
TimeoutFail ==
    /\ state = "WaitingAck"
    /\ timer = 0
    /\ retransmitCount[currentChunk] >= MaxRetries
    /\ state' = "Failed"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunk, time>>

(* Action: Decrement timer *)
DecrementTimer ==
    /\ state = "WaitingAck"
    /\ timer > 0
    /\ timer' = timer - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunk, state, time>>

(* Action: Idle (no operation) *)
Idle ==
    /\ state \in {"Done", "Failed"}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunk, timer, time>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ TransmitChunk
    \/ ReceiveAck
    \/ TimeoutRetransmit
    \/ TimeoutFail
    \/ DecrementTimer
    \/ Idle

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunk, state, timer, time>>

(* Type correctness invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ sentChunks \subseteq ChunkIndices
    /\ ackedChunks \subseteq ChunkIndices
    /\ \A i \in ChunkIndices: 0 <= retransmitCount[i] <= MaxRetries
    /\ timer \in Nat
    /\ currentChunk \in ChunkIndices \cup {NumChunks + 1}
    /\ state \in {"Idle", "WaitingAck", "Done", "Failed"}
    /\ time \in Nat

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS DBKeys, DBValues, TxnIds, TxnOps, TxnStates, TxnSteps, TxnReadOps, TxnWriteOps
VARIABLES db, txnReadSet, txnState, txnStep, txnWriteSet, txn

vars == <<db, txnReadSet, txnState, txnStep, txnWriteSet, txn>>

Init ==
    /\ db = [k \in DBKeys |-> DBValues] \* Initial database state
    /\ txn = [t \in TxnIds |-> [op \in TxnOps |-> [step \in TxnSteps |-> FALSE]]] \* Transaction operation steps
    /\ txnState = [t \in TxnIds |-> TxnStates] \* Transaction states
    /\ txnStep = [t \in TxnIds |-> TxnSteps] \* Transaction steps
    /\ txnReadSet = [t \in TxnIds |-> [k \in DBKeys |-> DBValues]] \* Transaction read sets
    /\ txnWriteSet = [t \in TxnIds |-> [k \in DBKeys |-> DBValues]] \* Transaction write sets

Next ==
    \E t \in TxnIds :
        /\ txnState[t] = "begin"
        /\ txnStep[t] = "begin"
        /\ txnState' = [txnState EXCEPT ![t] = "commit"]
        /\ txnStep' = [txnStep EXCEPT ![t] = "commit"]
        /\ txnReadSet' = txnReadSet
        /\ txnWriteSet' = txnWriteSet
        /\ db' = db
        \/ /\ txnState[t] = "commit"
           /\ txnStep[t] = "commit"
           /\ txnState' = [txnState EXCEPT ![t] = "abort"]
           /\ txnStep' = [txnStep EXCEPT ![t] = "abort"]
           /\ txnReadSet' = txnReadSet
           /\ txnWriteSet' = txnWriteSet
           /\ db' = db
        \/ /\ txnState[t] = "commit"
           /\ txnStep[t] = "commit"
           /\ txnState' = [txnState EXCEPT ![t] = "commit"]
           /\ txnStep' = [txnStep EXCEPT ![t] = "commit"]
           /\ txnReadSet' = txnReadSet
           /\ txnWriteSet' = txnWriteSet
           /\ db' = [k \in DBKeys |-> IF k \in txnWriteSet[t] THEN txnWriteSet[t][k] ELSE db[k]]
        \/ /\ txnState[t] = "abort"
           /\ txnStep[t] = "abort"
           /\ txnState' = [txnState EXCEPT ![t] = "abort"]
           /\ txnStep' = [txnStep EXCEPT ![t] = "abort"]
           /\ txnReadSet' = txnReadSet
           /\ txnWriteSet' = txnWriteSet
           /\ db' = db

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, epsilon
VARIABLES clocks, offsets


vars == <<clocks, offsets>>

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N:
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + RandomOffset]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<clocks, offsets>> \- except for i

RandomOffset == CHOOSE o \in -5..5: TRUE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]   \- add bounds if needed

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ flag \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ turn \in 1..2

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, T
VARIABLES infected, known


vars == << known, infected >>

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {i}]
       /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> {i}]

Next == /\ \E i, j \in 1..N : i # j
       /\ known' = [k \in 1..N |-> known[k] \cup known[j]]
       /\ infected' = [k \in 1..N |-> infected[k] \cup infected[j]]
       /\ \A k \in 1..N : k # i => known'[k] = known[k]
       /\ \A k \in 1..N : k # i => infected'[k] = infected[k]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ \A i \in 1..N : known[i] \subseteq 1..N
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : infected[i] \subseteq 1..N

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == 
  /\ free = {1, 2, .., N}
  /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == 
  /\ \E c \in Client : \E p \in free :
       /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
       /\ free' = free \ {p}
  \/ \E c \in Client : \E p \in allocated[c] :
       /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
       /\ free' = free \cup {p}
  \/ free' = free
      /\ allocated' = allocated

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Messages, Subscribers, Topics

VARIABLES subscribers, messages

(* State variables:
   subscribers: mapping from topic to set of subscriber IDs
   messages: mapping from topic to sequence of messages *)

Init == 
  /\ subscribers = [t \in Topics |-> {}]
  /\ messages = [t \in Topics |-> <<>>]

Next == 
  \E t \in Topics : \E s \in Subscribers : \E m \in Messages :
    \/ (* Subscriber registers interest in topic t *)
       /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![t] = subscribers[t] \cup {s}]
       /\ messages' = messages
    \/ (* Publisher posts message m on topic t *)
       /\ subscribers' = subscribers
       /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![t] = Append(messages[t], m)]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants
        \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = wants
        \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ wants' = wants
        \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in 1..2
          /\ wants \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]

Safety == TypeOK /\ ~(\E i \in 1..2 : wants[i] /\ wants[3-i])

Liveness == TypeOK /\ []<>(\E i \in 1..2 : wants[i] /\ wants[3-i] /\ turn = i)

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Node
VARIABLES counts


vars == <<counts>>

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node : \E m \in Node :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = counts[n][m] + 1]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<counts>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in Node : counts[n] \in [Node -> Nat]
          /\ \A n \in Node : \A m \in Node : counts[n][m] \in Nat

====
